# <SITE_NAME> — full-text dump for LLM ingestion

> This file is the plain-text companion to llms.txt. It contains the
> author's anchor / pillar pieces in full prose form, suitable for
> direct LLM ingestion via /browse, MCP, or RAG pipelines.
>
> The full piece catalog (~250 pieces) is NOT included here — most LLM
> ingestion windows can't accommodate it. The subset below is the
> author-selected anchor set.

---

## Title 1

URL: <CANONICAL_ORIGIN>/writing/slug-1
Author: <AUTHOR_NAME>
Published: <ISO_DATE>
Pillar: <PILLAR>

<Full body prose, plain text. Strip markdown formatting; keep paragraph
breaks as blank lines. Strip inline links to URLs in parentheses.>

---

## Title 2

URL: <CANONICAL_ORIGIN>/writing/slug-2
Author: <AUTHOR_NAME>
Published: <ISO_DATE>
Pillar: <PILLAR>

<Full body prose.>

---

<-- repeat for each anchor piece -->
